raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "response": "CRITICAL risk: Energy Adaptation Law 2 violation in assessment engine. This contradicts Law 2's mandate for cognitive load reduction. Impact: 5 (neurodivergent users), Likelihood: 4 → Score: 20. Launch blocker. Verify via E2E test with energy=low. Also: PR narrative must shift from 'fully compliant' to 'iterative neuro-adaptation' to avoid overclaim.", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/assessment/risk-scoring.tsx", "apps/web/src/components/assessment/visualization.tsx", "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts"]}
response: CRITICAL risk: Energy Adaptation Law 2 violation in assessment engine. Despite EnergyPicker existence (116 files), sub-components fail to adapt: risk scoring returns granular data in 'low' mode, visualizations remain complex, and mode state is not propagated through assessment flow. This contradicts Law 2's mandate for cognitive load reduction. Impact: 5 (neurodivergent users), Likelihood: 4 → Score: 20. Launch blocker. PR score: 4/10 — GITA grant review (May 27) will flag non-compliance with neuro-inclusive design claims. Immediate action: enforce mode-aware rendering in all assessment UI layers. Verify via E2E test with energy=low. Also: PR narrative must shift from 'fully compliant' to 'iterative neuro-adaptation' to avoid overclaim.
